prompt: A dramatic sports poster featuring a waist-up portrait of a male cricket player in a royal blue Delhi Capitals jersey, facing slightly left in a strong three-quarter pose. His face is obscured by a large soft-edged vertical rectangular blur centered over the face, creating an anonymized reveal effect. Behind his head is a bright glowing white circular halo, centered like a spotlight or moon. The background is dark navy and black with electric blue flame-like textures rising on both sides, overlaid with rough chalk-style scribbles, arrows, circles, and large hand-drawn letters for a gritty urban sports aesthetic. The jersey has red-orange collar and placket accents, a white Puma logo on the right chest and sleeve, a Delhi Capitals crest on the left chest, a red circular Jio patch on the sleeve, a rectangular ALL SEASONS sponsor patch on the chest, and large Hero branding across the torso. Add realistic fabric texture, sweat sheen, grain, dust, scratches, and distressed poster wear. At the bottom, place elegant white handwritten script reading Welcome to Dilli above very large bold cracked white block letters reading REHAN AHMED. Use high contrast lighting, moody shadows, centered composition, and a premium IPL team announcement poster style.
